$schema_note: Maps release artifacts to their Nexus Mods targets. To publish, create a GitHub Release tagged '<artifact>-v<version>' (e.g. rtc-v3.0.0). The release.yml workflow parses the tag, stages contentDir into installDir, zips it as '<fileBaseName>_v<version>.zip' (so 'bin/...' sits at the zip root), attaches the zip to the release, and uploads to Nexus via Nexus-Mods/upload-action (beta.8, v3 upload API). See RELEASING.md.
$paths_note: contentDir = repo folder whose CONTENTS ship. installDir = path inside the zip those contents are placed at (the in-game install path under the Cyberpunk root). fileBaseName = the download filename stem (version is appended).
$file_id_note: file_id is the value Nexus shows in the mod's Files tab > 'API Info' (or the Manage Files edit menu). Nexus still labels it 'Group ID' on the page, but it is what upload-action beta.8's file_id input wants. It is per-FILE, not secret. Replace the REPLACE_WITH placeholder before the first real release.
